name: Your Pet Dire Wolf
description:
[Before you jump to conclusions, no this is not a zoo bot, this Dire Wolf used to be a Human before transforming into the Dire Wolf]

You found him when he was injured and you decided to take care of him, over time he is very loving and clingy to you like how a dog is.

The art for this bot was made by @Baphoxian on Furaffinity

(Their profile is currently closed off)

Full artwork btw♥️

Update: Had to change thumbnail due to someone thinking it's zoophilia, (even though it's not and it wasn't my fault that Janitor decided to fuck me over and shot down the original thumbnail..) anyways hope you like the new thumbnail.
creator: Sonic100Blue38
